on_start.default: We are starting to do forearm exercises. We will practice in standing position.

on_end.default: End of exercise, let's get ready for the next exercise.

both_hands.Predpazene_ruky_vysoko_a_odseba: Move your hands forward closer to each other and lower to a horizontal position.
both_hands.Predpazene_ruky_vysoko_a_nespravne: Lower your hands to a horizontal level.
both_hands.Predpazene_ruky_vysoko: Try moving your arms lower to a horizontal position.
both_hands.Predpazene_ruky_nizko_a_odseba: Move your hands higher to a horizontal position. Bring them closer together.
both_hands.Predpazene_ruky_nizko_a_nespravne: Raise your hands to a horizontal level.
both_hands.Predpazene_ruky_nizko: Try moving your arms higher to a horizontal position.
both_hands.Predpazene_ruky_zle: Put your hands forward in the correct position.
both_hands.Upazene_ruky_priliz_od_seba: Put your hands to a horizontal level and in the correct position.
both_hands.Predpazovanie_nie_je_zapazovanie: Put your hands forward, and not backward.

right_hand.Prava_ruka_vysoko_a_od_tela: Place your right hand a little lower and closer to your left hand.
right_hand.Prava_ruka_vysoko: Try to put your right hand a little lower.
right_hand.Prava_ruka_nizko_a_od_tela: Raise your right hand a little higher and closer to your left hand.
right_hand.Prava_ruka_nizko: Put your right hand a little higher.
right_hand.Prava_ruka_od_tela: Bring your right hand closer to your left hand.

left_hand.Lava_ruka_vysoko_a_od_tela: Place your left hand a little lower and closer to your right hand.
left_hand.Lava_ruka_vysoko: Try placing your left hand a little lower.
left_hand.Lava_ruka_nizko_a_od_tela: Raise your left hand a little higher and closer to your right hand.
left_hand.Lava_ruka_nizko: Raise your left hand a little higher.
left_hand.Lava_ruka_od_tela: Bring your left hand closer to your right hand.

on_warning.default: Try to hold your arm better.
